pi_items.source: Task description implicitly sets context at a national laboratory.
Task requirements and setup_task.sh source code.
verifier.py explicitly references pass_threshold 60 with a total possible score of 100.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies exclusively on synthetically generated Python files comprising a minimal mathematical library ('numlib'). The five explicit algorithmic bugs (Simpson's rule weights, RK4 step function indices, LU decomposition pivoting logic, cubic spline tridiagonal matrix bounds, and bisection method interval assignments) are mathematically sound and verifiable via inspection of the setup_task.sh generator. O*NET code 19-2012.00 accurately maps to Physicists under the Life, Physical, and Social Science major group.
